Reasoning
Q1
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
There are eight boxes namely i.e. P, B, R, G, W, Y,
M and O. They are placed one above the other
and contains different colour balls i.e. Black,
White, Red, Lime, Blue, Yellow, Cyan, Magenta,
Silver, Gray, Maroon, Olive, Green, Purple, Teal
and Navy such that each box contains two balls
but not necessarily in the same order.
Black balls are in W and it cannot be in the same
box with Teal colour balls and Navy colour
balls. Lime colour balls and Purple colour balls
are in the box R. There are exactly four boxes
between box Y and box P such that box Y is
above the box P and box P contains Gray colour
balls and Green colour balls. Box O is
immediately below the box B. Silver colour balls
and Maroon colour balls are in the box which is
third from the top. Box G contains White colour
balls and Red colour balls. Cyan colour box and
Magenta colour balls is immediately above the
box which contains Yellow colour balls and
Orange colour balls respectively and both these
boxes are above the 5th box from the top. The
box W is placed 4th from the top. The box M and
box R are at the bottom most and fourth from
the bottom respectively.
 
Which of the following statements is true with
respect to the given information?
(A) Box Y contains orange colour balls
(B) Box R is immediately above box G.
(C) Box O has silver colour balls.
(D) Box M and P has three boxes in between
them.
(E) None of these

answer the questions accordingly.
 
There are eight boxes namely i.e. P, B, R, G, W, Y,
M and O. They are placed one above the other
and contains different colour balls i.e. Black,
White, Red, Lime, Blue, Yellow, Cyan, Magenta,
Silver, Gray, Maroon, Olive, Green, Purple, Teal
and Navy such that each box contains two balls
but not necessarily in the same order.
Black balls are in W and it cannot be in the same
box with Teal colour balls and Navy colour
balls. Lime colour balls and Purple colour balls
are in the box R. There are exactly four boxes
between box Y and box P such that box Y is
above the box P and box P contains Gray colour
balls and Green colour balls. Box O is
immediately below the box B. Silver colour balls
and Maroon colour balls are in the box which is
third from the top. Box G contains White colour
balls and Red colour balls. Cyan colour box and
Magenta colour balls is immediately above the
box which contains Yellow colour balls and
Orange colour balls respectively and both these
boxes are above the 5th box from the top. The
box W is placed 4th from the top. The box M and
 
Tabular Puzzle

box R are at the bottom most and fourth from
the bottom respectively.
 
Four of the following are alike in certain way
and so form a group. Which one of the
following does not belong to the group?
(A) G- red
(B) R- Purple
(C) G- Gray
(D) B- Orange
(E) None of these
Q3
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
There are eight boxes namely i.e. P, B, R, G, W, Y,
M and O. They are placed one above the other
and contains different colour balls i.e. Black,
White, Red, Lime, Blue, Yellow, Cyan, Magenta,
Silver, Gray, Maroon, Olive, Green, Purple, Teal
and Navy such that each box contains two balls
but not necessarily in the same order.
Black balls are in W and it cannot be in the same
box with Teal colour balls and Navy colour
balls. Lime colour balls and Purple colour balls
are in the box R. There are exactly four boxes
between box Y and box P such that box Y is
above the box P and box P contains Gray colour
balls and Green colour balls. Box O is
immediately below the box B. Silver colour balls
and Maroon colour balls are in the box which is
third from the top. Box G contains White colour
balls and Red colour balls. Cyan colour box and
Magenta colour balls is immediately above the
box which contains Yellow colour balls and
Orange colour balls respectively and both these
boxes are above the 5th box from the top. The
box W is placed 4th from the top. The box M and
box R are at the bottom most and fourth from
the bottom respectively.
 
Which box is between the box B and the box
that contains Navy colour balls?
(A) P
(B) W
(C) R
(D) O
(E) None of these
Q4
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
There are eight boxes namely i.e. P, B, R, G, W, Y,
M and O. They are placed one above the other
and contains different colour balls i.e. Black,
White, Red, Lime, Blue, Yellow, Cyan, Magenta,
Silver, Gray, Maroon, Olive, Green, Purple, Teal
and Navy such that each box contains two balls
but not necessarily in the same order.
Black balls are in W and it cannot be in the same
box with Teal colour balls and Navy colour
balls. Lime colour balls and Purple colour balls
are in the box R. There are exactly four boxes
between box Y and box P such that box Y is
above the box P and box P contains Gray colour
balls and Green colour balls. Box O is
immediately below the box B. Silver colour balls
and Maroon colour balls are in the box which is
third from the top. Box G contains White colour
balls and Red colour balls. Cyan colour box and
Magenta colour balls is immediately above the
box which contains Yellow colour balls and
Orange colour balls respectively and both these
boxes are above the 5th box from the top. The
box W is placed 4th from the top. The box M and
box R are at the bottom most and fourth from
the bottom respectively.
 
Which box is sixth from the top?
(A) B
(B) O
(C) P
(D) W
(E) M

Q5
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
First 10 numbers are written from Top to Bottom.
The word 'HORSE' is written in alphabetical order
against each multiple of 2 (One letter against one
number) from bottom to top. Position of V is
exactly between E and H. There are as many
letters between V and P as between V and W. F is
placed exactly above R and Y is exactly between
R and S. Position of P is not equal to 5.
 
Who is in between O and R?
(A) H
(B) S
(C) F
(D) E
(E) None of these
Q6
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
First 10 numbers are written from Top to Bottom.
The word 'HORSE' is written in alphabetical order
against each multiple of 2 (One letter against one
number) from bottom to top. Position of V is
exactly between E and H. There are as many
letters between V and P as between V and W. F is
placed exactly above R and Y is exactly between
R and S. Position of P is not equal to 5.
 
Which alphabet is written against number 9?
(A) H
(B) S
(C) Y
(D) E
(E) None of these
Q7
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
First 10 numbers are written from Top to Bottom.
The word 'HORSE' is written in alphabetical order
against each multiple of 2 (One letter against one
number) from bottom to top. Position of V is
exactly between E and H. There are as many
letters between V and P as between V and W. F is
placed exactly above R and Y is exactly between
R and S. Position of P is not equal to 5.
 
Which is the third letter in the word formed by
the letters against 10, 4, 6 and 2 in the same
order?
(A) H
(B) S
(C) O
(D) E
(E) None of these
Q8
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
First 13 even numbers are written from top to
bottom. The letter of word “ADVENT” are written
in the same order against each multiple of 4 (one
letter against one number) from top to bottom.
There are two even numbers between A and L.
There are three letters between W and L. No
letters between Y and T. J is above L but below P.
V is immediately above O. Y is not below T.
 
Find odd one out ?
(A) P, L
(B) D, E
(C) V, N
(D) O, W
(E) E,T
Q9
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
First 13 even numbers are written from top to
bottom. The letter of word “ADVENT” are written
in the same order against each multiple of 4 (one
letter against one number) from top to bottom.
There are two even numbers between A and L.
There are three letters between W and L. No

letters between Y and T. J is above L but below P.
V is immediately above O. Y is not below T.
 
How many letters between T and D ?
(A) 13
(B) 7
(C) 11
(D) 12
(E) None of these
Q10
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
First 13 even numbers are written from top to
bottom. The letter of word “ADVENT” are written
in the same order against each multiple of 4 (one
letter against one number) from top to bottom.
There are two even numbers between A and L.
There are three letters between W and L. No
letters between Y and T. J is above L but below P.
V is immediately above O. Y is not below T.
 
If all the letters are arranged in reverse
alphabetical order from top to bottom then how
many letters written between J and W ?
(A) 8
(B) 10
(C) 6
(D) 11
(E) None of these
Q11
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
First 13 even numbers are written from top to
bottom. The letter of word “ADVENT” are written
in the same order against each multiple of 4 (one
letter against one number) from top to bottom.
There are two even numbers between A and L.
There are three letters between W and L. No
letters between Y and T. J is above L but below P.
V is immediately above O. Y is not below T.
 
Who among the following letter is three places
above N?
(A) O
(B) A
(C) D
(D) W
(E) None of these
Q12
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
First 13 numbers starting from 1 are written from
top to bottom. The word ''BRIDGES'' is written in
alphabetical order against each odd number
from top to bottom. Two letters are between D
and M. The number of letters written between X
and E is 0. The number of letters written between
X and M is the same as M and U.The position
value of Z is 10. There is no letter between B and
K.
 
How many forward and backward pairs of
letters are there in a word formed by the
positions 1, 9, 11 and 3 respectively in that
order and have as many letters between them
in the word as in the alphabetical series?
(A) 4
(B) 5
(C) 0
(D) 8
(E) 7
Q13
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
First 13 numbers starting from 1 are written from
top to bottom. The word ''BRIDGES'' is written in
alphabetical order against each odd number
from top to bottom. Two letters are between D
and M. The number of letters written between X
and E is 0. The number of letters written between
X and M is the same as M and U.The position
value of Z is 10. There is no letter between B and
K.

Which letters are placed between 5 and 8 ?
(A) M and G
(B) L and G
(C) D and M
(D) R and E
(E) I and S
Q14
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
First 15 natural numbers are written from top to
Bottom. The letters of the word “LOBSTER” are
written in the alphabetical order against each
multiple of 2 (one letter against one number)
from top to bottom. M is placed exactly between
T and S. H is placed exactly between L and O. No
letters are between A and B. The number of
letters between M and Q is the same as between
L and O. Letter Y is Placed exactly above the
letter R. The number of letters between Q and Y
is the same as the number of letters between M
and Q. Number of letters between A and H is the
same as the number of letters between H and M.
 
How many letters between L and R?
(A) 4
(B) 5
(C) 3
(D) 7
(E) None of these
Q15
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
First 15 natural numbers are written from top to
Bottom. The letters of the word “LOBSTER” are
written in the alphabetical order against each
multiple of 2 (one letter against one number)
from top to bottom. M is placed exactly between
T and S. H is placed exactly between L and O. No
letters are between A and B. The number of
letters between M and Q is the same as between
L and O. Letter Y is Placed exactly above the
letter R. The number of letters between Q and Y
is the same as the number of letters between M
and Q. Number of letters between A and H is the
same as the number of letters between H and M.
 
What is the total sum of the number against
letter A, B and E according to the arrangement
formed ?
(A) 4
(B) 5
(C) 7
(D) 9
(E) None of these
Q16
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
First 17 prime numbers are written from top to
bottom. The letter of the word “NOTCHING” are
written in the same order against alternative
prime numbers ( one letter against one number )
from top to bottom starting from 3.
M is placed against highest prime number.Only
three letters are placed between M and Q. Only
one letter is placed between V and Q. R is not
placed adjacent to C and H. Only five letters are
placed between R and P. Only three letters are
placed between X and W which is not placed
below 5. Y is below X but above U. R neither
placed against 47 nor placed at the least prime
number. U is not placed against third highest
prime number. V is not adjacent to H.
Which 
of 
the 
following 
letter 
is 
placed
immediately above G ?
(A) V
(B) U
(C) Q
(D) P
(E) None of these
Q17
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
First 17 prime numbers are written from top to
bottom. The letter of the word “NOTCHING” are

written in the same order against alternative
prime numbers ( one letter against one number )
from top to bottom starting from 3.
M is placed against highest prime number.Only
three letters are placed between M and Q. Only
one letter is placed between V and Q. R is not
placed adjacent to C and H. Only five letters are
placed between R and P. Only three letters are
placed between X and W which is not placed
below 5. Y is below X but above U. R neither
placed against 47 nor placed at the least prime
number. U is not placed against third highest
prime number. V is not adjacent to H.
 
How many letters are placed between R and V?
(A) 5
(B) 8
(C) 9
(D) 7
(E) None of these

Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
First 17 prime numbers are written from top to
bottom. The letter of the word “NOTCHING” are
written in the same order against alternative
prime numbers ( one letter against one number )
from top to bottom starting from 3.

Q19
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
First 17 prime numbers are written from top to
bottom. The letter of the word “NOTCHING” are
written in the same order against alternative
prime numbers ( one letter against one number )
from top to bottom starting from 3.
M is placed against highest prime number.Only

(A) X

(C) Q

(E) None of these
Q20
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
First 18 even numbers are written from top to
bottom. The letter of the word “INCHOATE” are
written in the same order against alternative
even numbers ( one letter against one number )
from top to bottom starting from 4.
B is placed against at highest even number. Only
four letters are placed between B and D. Only
three letter are placed between M and D. Only
five letters are placed between P and Q which is
not placed below 18. P is not placed below Q. G is
not placed adjacent to H and T. M is not placed

adjacent to T and A. G is placed above D but
below Q. Only one letter are placed between G
and J. Only three letters are placed between F
and J. K is not placed below F and Q. One of the
letter is L.
 
As many letter are between P and Q is same as
between _______?
(A) Q and F
(B) J and G
(C) D and M
(D) M and G
(E) None of these
Q21
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
First 18 even numbers are written from top to
bottom. The letter of the word “INCHOATE” are
written in the same order against alternative
even numbers ( one letter against one number )
from top to bottom starting from 4.
B is placed against at highest even number. Only
four letters are placed between B and D. Only
three letter are placed between M and D. Only
five letters are placed between P and Q which is
not placed below 18. P is not placed below Q. G is
not placed adjacent to H and T. M is not placed
adjacent to T and A. G is placed above D but
below Q. Only one letter are placed between G
and J. Only three letters are placed between F
and J. K is not placed below F and Q. One of the
letter is L.
 
How many letters are placed below F ?
(A) 13
(B) 15
(C) 11
(D) 17
(E) None of these
Q22
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
There are eight boxes namely i.e. P, B, R, G, W, Y,
M and O. They are placed one above the other
and contains different colour balls i.e. Black,
White, Red, Lime, Blue, Yellow, Cyan, Magenta,
Silver, Gray, Maroon, Olive, Green, Purple, Teal
and Navy such that each box contains two balls
but not necessarily in the same order.
Black balls are in W and it cannot be in the same
box with Teal colour balls and Navy colour
balls. Lime colour balls and Purple colour balls
are in the box R. There are exactly four boxes
between box Y and box P such that box Y is
above the box P and box P contains Gray colour
balls and Green colour balls. Box O is
immediately below the box B. Silver colour balls
and Maroon colour balls are in the box which is
third from the top. Box G contains White colour
balls and Red colour balls. Cyan colour box and
Magenta colour balls is immediately above the
box which contains Yellow colour balls and
Orange colour balls respectively and both these
boxes are above the 5th box from the top. The
box W is placed 4th from the top. The box M and
box R are at the bottom most and fourth from
the bottom respectively.
 
How many boxes are placed between the box
O and the box that contains teal colour balls?
(A) Two
(B) One
(C) More than three
(D) Three
(E) None of these

Hints & Solutions
Q1
Text Solution:
We have,
1. The box W is placed 4th from the top.
2. The box M and box R are at the bottom most
and fourth from the bottom respectively.
3. Lime colour balls and Purple colour balls are in
the box R.
4. Silver colour balls and Maroon colour balls are
in the box which is third from the top.
5. Cyan colour box and Magenta colour balls is
immediately above the box which contains
Yellow colour balls and Orange colour balls
respectively and both these boxes are above the
5th box from the top.

Q5
Text Solution:
First 10 numbers are written from Top to Bottom.
The word 'HORSE' is written in alphabetical order
against each multiple of 2 (One letter against one
number) from bottom to top.
1
 
2 E
3 
4 H
5 
6 O
7 
8 R
9 
10 S
There are 1 letter between E and H and that letter
is V. There are as many letters between V and P
as between V and W. There are 3 letters between
E and O. V is against number 3. F is placed
exactly above R and Y is exactly between R and
S.
(position of p is not equal to 5 is fixed by the
statement)
1
P
2 E
3 V
4 H
5 W
6 O
7 F
8 R
9 Y
10 S
F is sitting between O and R.

Q7
Text Solution:
First 10 numbers are written from Top to Bottom.
The word 'HORSE' is written in alphabetical order
against each multiple of 2 (One letter against
one number) from bottom to top.
1

We have,
1. The box W is placed 4th from the top.

and fourth from the bottom respectively.
